title: NeoFrontier
description: A lightweight NeoForge survival and Create-focused modpack with exploration, building, storage, voice chat, and multiplayer-friendly performance improvements.
body:
# About

This is a lightweight and optimized NeoForge modpack focused on multiplayer survival, building, exploration, and Create automation.

The pack is designed to run smoothly while still adding fun and useful features for both solo and multiplayer gameplay.

# Features

- Create and Create Additions automation
- Exploration improvements with Nature's Compass and Explorer's Compass
- Building enhancements with Macaw's Bridges and Doors
- Better storage with Sophisticated Backpacks and Sophisticated Storage
- Waystones fast travel system
- Xaero's Minimap and World Map support
- Simple Voice Chat for multiplayer communication
- Performance optimization mods like FerriteCore, Clumps, ModernFix, and ServerCore

# Multiplayer Friendly

This modpack was built mainly for playing with friends on servers and includes:
- Voice chat
- Player ranks support
- Optimized server performance
- Cooperative exploration and automation gameplay

# Performance

The modpack is designed to stay relatively lightweight while still offering a large amount of content and quality-of-life improvements.

# Mods Included

Some included mods:
- Create
- Farmer's Delight
- Sophisticated Backpacks
- Waystones
- Xaero's Minimap
- Chipped
- TreeChop
- Simple Voice Chat
and more.

# Loader

- NeoForge 1.21.1
